title: Madhya Pradesh High Court censures State for suspending cop who raided IAS officer’s farmhouse
description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court has censured the State police for suspending a sub-inspector who raided an IAS officer’s farmhouse following a tip-off about illegal gambling [Lokendra Singh Hihore v State of Madhya Pradesh]Justice Jai Kumar Pillai on May 7 quashed the suspension order issued by Superintendent of Police of Indore district (Gramin) against police station in-charge Lokendra Singh Hihore on March 11.The Court said the order against Hihore prima facie appeared to have been passed in an
